user_request: Update system prompts, agent instructions, campaign briefs, and strategy rules based on detailed copy feedback (stop selling, start conversing; no timeframes; no links in steps 1-3; emphasize 'giving away' vs 'selling'; power-partner = recruiter-built stack given away to help industry survive AI; direct-value = recruiters helping recruiters implement AI + new revenue stream; capstone = one-call one-workflow rebuild, no timeline)

workaround_used: Logged the gap; will ask dev to hand-edit the briefs and agent prompts, then re-run generate_preview_pack to show new samples.
